commands.name: add-module
commands.description: Add a multi-package module to a solution by finding all packages of the module, finding related projects in the solution and adding each package to the corresponding project in the solution.

commands.name: add-package
commands.description: Add a new WEBSYSTEM package to a project by adding related NuGet package dependencies and [DependsOn(...)] attributes.

commands.name: generate-proxy
commands.description: Generates typescript service proxies and DTOs

commands.name: get-source
commands.description: Download the source code of the specified module.

commands.name: help
commands.description: Show command line help. Write ` webSystem help <command> `

commands.name: new
commands.description: Generate a new solution based on the WEBSYSTEM startup templates.

commands.name: suite
commands.description: Install, update, remove or start WEBSYSTEM Suite. See https://commercial.webSystem.io/tools/suite.

commands.name: switch-to-nightly
commands.description: Switches packages to nightly preview WEBSYSTEM version.

commands.name: switch-to-preview
commands.description: Switches packages to preview WEBSYSTEM version.

commands.name: switch-to-stable
commands.description: Switches packages to stable WEBSYSTEM version from preview version.

commands.name: translate
commands.description:
Mainly used to translate WEBSYSTEM's resources (JSON files) easier.
To get a detailed help for a command:
webSystem help <command>
See the documentation for more info: https://docs.webSystem.io/en/webSystem/latest/CLI

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update all WEBSYSTEM related NuGet packages and NPM packages in a solution or project to the latest version.
